action.reasoning: Observation: best eval is 0.8061 using checkpoints_long/best.pt, and predict.py currently uses only single-view inference. Analysis: horizontal-flip test-time augmentation is cheap, architecture-compatible, and often improves CIFAR accuracy without retraining. Decision: update predict.py to average original and flipped logits, then resubmit the current best checkpoint for evaluation.
